name: Altergeist Malwisp
name_jp: オルターガイスト・マルウィスプ
desc: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Altergeist" monster in your GY, except "Altergeist Malwisp"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but for the rest of this turn, it cannot activate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Malwisp" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Altergeist" monster in your GY, except "Altergeist Malwisp"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but for the rest of this turn, it cannot activate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Malwisp" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Altergeist" monster in your GY, except "Altergeist Malwisp"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but for the rest of this turn, it cannot activate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Malwisp" once per turn.

action: Activates if added to the hand
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
